tools.name: skysight_start
tools.description: Start Skysight so ChatGPT can answer questions about recent activity.

tools.name: skysight_stop
tools.description: Stop Skysight and return the current status.

tools.name: skysight_status
tools.description: Get Skysight status and paths to recent activity files.

tools.name: skysight_update_exclusion
tools.description: Add or remove an app, website, or private browsing from Skysight recording.

tools.name: skysight_list_exclusions
tools.description: List apps, websites, and private browsing excluded from Skysight.
